mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_audit_log (memory_id, tool_name, skill_name, call_time, duration_ms, llm_model, iteration_count, params, result, success, error_msg, cre_time) VALUES (#{memoryId}, #{toolName}, #{skillName}, #{callTime}, #{durationMs}, #{llmModel}, #{iterationCount}, #{params}, #{result}, #{success}, #{errorMsg}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM agent_audit_log WHERE memory_id = #{memoryId} ORDER BY call_time DESC
SELECT * FROM agent_audit_log WHERE tool_name = #{toolName} ORDER BY call_time DESC
SELECT * FROM agent_audit_log ORDER BY call_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT tool_name as toolName, COUNT(*) as callCount, SUM(CASE WHEN success = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as successCount FROM agent_audit_log GROUP BY tool_name ORDER BY callCount DESC
SELECT DATE(call_time) as day, COUNT(*) as callCount, SUM(CASE WHEN success = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as successCount FROM agent_audit_log GROUP BY DATE(call_time) ORDER BY day DESC
